'''鈭歬-h-p''' ('''kakahap''') is an [[Aelaki]] [[Verbs|active verb]] meaning "[[Wikt:brandish|brandish]] (auto-generated)".

== Overview ==
{| class="wikitable"
|-
! Root consonants
| k-h-p
|-
! Word class
| [[Active verb]]
|-
! Gloss
| [[Wikt:brandish|brandish]] (auto-generated)
|-
! Citation form
| 鈭歬-h-p
|-
! Lemma
| kakahap
|}

== [[Agent]] agreement paradigm ==
''Base present, no evidential.''
{| class="wikitable sortable"
! Gender.Number !! 1st !! 2nd !! 3rd !! 4th
|-
| [[child]].[[collective]] || [[word:thikahap|thikahap]] || [[word:jikahap|jikahap]] || [[word:shikahap|shikahap]] || [[word:kikahap|kikahap]]
|-
| [[child]].[[plural]] || [[word:thuthukahap|thuthukahap]] || [[word:jujukahap|jujukahap]] || [[word:shushukahap|shushukahap]] || [[word:kukukahap|kukukahap]]
|-
| [[child]].[[singular]] || [[word:thukahap|thukahap]] || [[word:jukahap|jukahap]] || [[word:shukahap|shukahap]] || [[word:kukahap|kukahap]]
|-
| [[child]].[[zero]] || [[word:thukahap|thukahap]] || [[word:jukahap|jukahap]] || [[word:shukahap|shukahap]] || [[word:kukahap|kukahap]]
|-
| [[female]].[[collective]] || [[word:thekahap|thekahap]] || [[word:jekahap|jekahap]] || [[word:shekahap|shekahap]] || [[word:kekahap|kekahap]]
|-
| [[female]].[[plural]] || [[word:thothokahap|thothokahap]] || [[word:jojokahap|jojokahap]] || [[word:shoshokahap|shoshokahap]] || [[word:kokokahap|kokokahap]]
|-
| [[female]].[[singular]] || [[word:thokahap|thokahap]] || [[word:jokahap|jokahap]] || [[word:shokahap|shokahap]] || [[word:kokahap|kokahap]]
|-
| [[female]].[[zero]] || [[word:thokahap|thokahap]] || [[word:jokahap|jokahap]] || [[word:shokahap|shokahap]] || [[word:kokahap|kokahap]]
|-
| [[inanimate]].[[collective]] || [[word:kahap|kahap]] || [[word:kahap|kahap]] || [[word:kahap|kahap]] || [[word:kahap|kahap]]
|-
| [[inanimate]].[[plural]] || [[word:kahap|kahap]] || [[word:kahap|kahap]] || [[word:kahap|kahap]] || [[word:kahap|kahap]]
|-
| [[inanimate]].[[singular]] || [[word:kahap|kahap]] || [[word:kahap|kahap]] || [[word:kahap|kahap]] || [[word:kahap|kahap]]
|-
| [[inanimate]].[[zero]] || [[word:kahap|kahap]] || [[word:kahap|kahap]] || [[word:kahap|kahap]] || [[word:kahap|kahap]]
|-
| [[male]].[[collective]] || [[word:th忙kahap|th忙kahap]] || [[word:j忙kahap|j忙kahap]] || [[word:sh忙kahap|sh忙kahap]] || [[word:k忙kahap|k忙kahap]]
|-
| [[male]].[[plural]] || [[word:thathakahap|thathakahap]] || [[word:jajakahap|jajakahap]] || [[word:shashakahap|shashakahap]] || [[word:kakakahap|kakakahap]]
|-
| [[male]].[[singular]] || [[word:thakahap|thakahap]] || [[word:jakahap|jakahap]] || [[word:shakahap|shakahap]] || [[word:kakahap|kakahap]]
|-
| [[male]].[[zero]] || [[word:thakahap|thakahap]] || [[word:jakahap|jakahap]] || [[word:shakahap|shakahap]] || [[word:kakahap|kakahap]]
|}

== Evidential and TAM forms ==
{| class="wikitable sortable"
! Form !! Surface form
|-
| [[active]].none || [[word:shakahap|shakahap]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].none || [[word:goshakahap|goshakahap]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].none || [[word:gokishakahap|gokishakahap]]
|-
| [[active]].[[present]] || [[word:shakahapn眉|shakahapn眉]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[present]] || [[word:goshakahapnkn眉|goshakahapnkn眉]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[present]] || [[word:gokishakahapn眉|gokishakahapn眉]]
|-
| [[active]].[[past]]_[[visual]] || [[word:shakahapsh毛|shakahapsh毛]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[past]]_[[visual]] || [[word:goshakahapnksh毛|goshakahapnksh毛]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[past]]_[[visual]] || [[word:gokishakahapsh毛|gokishakahapsh毛]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hearsay]] || [[word:shakahapro|shakahapro]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[hearsay]] || [[word:goshakahapnkro|goshakahapnkro]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[hearsay]] || [[word:gokishakahapro|gokishakahapro]]
|-
| [[active]].[[inferential]] || [[word:shakahapmu|shakahapmu]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[inferential]] || [[word:goshakahapnkmu|goshakahapnkmu]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[inferential]] || [[word:gokishakahapmu|gokishakahapmu]]
|-
| [[active]].[[mythical]] || [[word:shakahapsher|shakahapsher]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[mythical]] || [[word:goshakahapnksher|goshakahapnksher]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[mythical]] || [[word:gokishakahapsher|gokishakahapsher]]
|-
| [[active]].[[intention]] || [[word:shakahapng|shakahapng]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[intention]] || [[word:goshakahapnkng|goshakahapnkng]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[intention]] || [[word:gokishakahapng|gokishakahapng]]
|-
| [[active]].[[optative]] || [[word:shakahapya|shakahapya]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[optative]] || [[word:goshakahapnkya|goshakahapnkya]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[optative]] || [[word:gokishakahapya|gokishakahapya]]
|-
| [[active]].[[deliberative]] || [[word:shakahapyam|shakahapyam]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[deliberative]] || [[word:goshakahapnkyam|goshakahapnkyam]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[deliberative]] || [[word:gokishakahapyam|gokishakahapyam]]
|-
| [[active]].[[present]]_[[past]] || [[word:shakahapn眉sh毛|shakahapn眉sh毛]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[present]]_[[past]] || [[word:goshakahapnkn眉sh毛|goshakahapnkn眉sh毛]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[present]]_[[past]] || [[word:gokishakahapn眉sh毛|gokishakahapn眉sh毛]]
|-
| [[active]].[[present]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:shakahapn眉ro|shakahapn眉ro]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[present]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:goshakahapnkn眉ro|goshakahapnkn眉ro]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[present]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:gokishakahapn眉ro|gokishakahapn眉ro]]
|-
| [[active]].[[present]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:shakahapn眉mu|shakahapn眉mu]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[present]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:goshakahapnkn眉mu|goshakahapnkn眉mu]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[present]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gokishakahapn眉mu|gokishakahapn眉mu]]
|-
| [[active]].[[past]]_[[present]] || [[word:shakahapsh毛n眉|shakahapsh毛n眉]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[past]]_[[present]] || [[word:goshakahapnksh毛n眉|goshakahapnksh毛n眉]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[past]]_[[present]] || [[word:gokishakahapsh毛n眉|gokishakahapsh毛n眉]]
|-
| [[active]].[[past]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:shakahapsh毛ro|shakahapsh毛ro]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[past]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:goshakahapnksh毛ro|goshakahapnksh毛ro]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[past]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:gokishakahapsh毛ro|gokishakahapsh毛ro]]
|-
| [[active]].[[past]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:shakahapsh毛mu|shakahapsh毛mu]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[past]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:goshakahapnksh毛mu|goshakahapnksh毛mu]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[past]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gokishakahapsh毛mu|gokishakahapsh毛mu]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hearsay]]_[[present]] || [[word:shakahapron眉|shakahapron眉]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[hearsay]]_[[present]] || [[word:goshakahapnkron眉|goshakahapnkron眉]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[hearsay]]_[[present]] || [[word:gokishakahapron眉|gokishakahapron眉]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hearsay]]_[[past]] || [[word:shakahaprosh毛|shakahaprosh毛]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[hearsay]]_[[past]] || [[word:goshakahapnkrosh毛|goshakahapnkrosh毛]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[hearsay]]_[[past]] || [[word:gokishakahaprosh毛|gokishakahaprosh毛]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hearsay]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:shakahapromu|shakahapromu]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[hearsay]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:goshakahapnkromu|goshakahapnkromu]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[hearsay]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gokishakahapromu|gokishakahapromu]]
|-
| [[active]].[[inferential]]_[[present]] || [[word:shakahapmun眉|shakahapmun眉]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[inferential]]_[[present]] || [[word:goshakahapnkmun眉|goshakahapnkmun眉]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[inferential]]_[[present]] || [[word:gokishakahapmun眉|gokishakahapmun眉]]
|-
| [[active]].[[inferential]]_[[past]] || [[word:shakahapmush毛|shakahapmush毛]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[inferential]]_[[past]] || [[word:goshakahapnkmush毛|goshakahapnkmush毛]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[inferential]]_[[past]] || [[word:gokishakahapmush毛|gokishakahapmush毛]]
|-
| [[active]].[[inferential]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:shakahapmuro|shakahapmuro]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[inferential]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:goshakahapnkmuro|goshakahapnkmuro]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[inferential]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:gokishakahapmuro|gokishakahapmuro]]
|}

''63 forms generated.''

== See also ==
* [[Aelaki Lexicon]]

{{wordpage|eda3f80}}
